title: LLM Base Properties
description: Shared properties for llm, s2s, and vendor-specific s2s verb schemas.

id.description: An optional unique identifier for this verb instance.

model.description: The specific model to use from the vendor.

auth.description: Authentication credentials for the LLM vendor API.

apiKey.description: The API key for the LLM vendor.

connectOptions.description: Additional connection options for the LLM vendor, such as custom base URLs or API versions.

llmOptions.description: Configuration passed to the LLM including the system prompt, temperature, tools/functions, and other model parameters. The structure varies by vendor but typically includes 'messages' (conversation history), 'temperature', 'tools' (function definitions), and 'maxTokens'.

messages.content: You are a helpful customer service agent for Acme Corp.

url.description: The URL of the MCP server.

mcpServers.description: Model Context Protocol servers to connect to. MCP servers provide tools that the LLM can invoke during the conversation.

actionHook.description: A webhook invoked when the LLM conversation ends. Receives conversation details and should return the next verbs to execute.

eventHook.description: A webhook invoked for real-time events during the LLM conversation (e.g. tool calls, transcription events).

toolHook.description: A webhook invoked when the LLM calls a tool/function. Receives the tool name and arguments, and should return the tool result.

events.description: List of event types to receive via the eventHook.
